response: ## Perspective Audit Summary **Component/artifact reviewed:** Admin Settings Panel **Perspectives escalated for deep review:** Cognitive & Neurodivergent (HIGH), Magnification & Reflow (HIGH), Screen Reader & Semantic (MEDIUM), Environmental Contrast (MEDIUM) **Perspectives at LOW (not reviewed):** Keyboard & Motor, Auditory Access, Vestibular & Motion --- ### Findings by Severity | Severity | Count | |---|---| | CRITICAL | 0 | | MAJOR | 4 | | MINOR | 3 | | ENHANCEMENT | 2 | --- ### Perspectives That Passed None. All four escalated perspectives have findings. --- ### Perspectives With Findings — Grouped by ARRM Role **Content Author** - **Jargon without plain-language explanations** — Cognitive & Neurodivergent — MAJOR — 3.2.4 (Consistent Navigation) - **Error messages use technical codes instead of plain English** — Cognitive & Neurodivergent — MAJOR — 3.3.3 (Error Suggestion) - **Required fields marked with asterisk only** — Cognitive & Neurodivergent — MAJOR — 3.3.2 (Label Association) **Visual Design** - **Grid layout fails 320px reflow** — Magnification & Reflow — MAJOR — 1.4.10 (Reflow) - **Headings use 9px font size** — Magnification & Reflow — MINOR — 1.4.4 (Text Scaling) - **Error text contrast (red on white) is 4.5:1** — Environmental Contrast — ENHANCEMENT — 1.4.6 (Contrast AAA) **Front-End Dev** - **No `aria-required` on required checkboxes** — Screen Reader & Semantic — MAJOR — 3.3.2 (Label Association) - **No page title defined** — Screen Reader & Semantic — MINOR — 2.4.2 (Page Title) --- ### Open Questions Requiring Human Verification - Error message "ERR_CSP_001" lacks plain-English explanation (needs content author verification) - "stale-while-revalidate cache" requires glossary definition (needs content author verification) --- ### Recommended Next Step **REVISE** (MAJOR findings present — address before shipping) --- ## Detailed Findings ``` **Finding:** Technical jargon like "HSTS preloading" and "stale-while-revalidate cache" lacks plain-language explanations **WCAG:** 3.2.4 Consistent Navigation **Perspective:** Cognitive & Neurodivergent **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Content Author (secondary: UX Design) **Evidence:** SECURITY_TOGGLES[0].label, LOGGING_TOGGLES[3].label **Fix:** Add tooltips or glossary links to technical terms ``` ``` **Finding:** Error message "ERR_CSP_001" uses technical code instead of plain English **WCAG:** 3.3.3 Error Suggestion **Perspective:** Cognitive & Neurodivergent **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Content Author (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** SECURITY_TOGGLES[1].error **Fix:** Replace with "Invalid Content Security Policy configuration. Ensure directives are properly formatted." ``` ``` **Finding:** Grid layout does not collapse to single column at 320px viewport **WCAG:** 1.4.10 Reflow **Perspective:** Magnification & Reflow **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Visual Design (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** CSS `.settings-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr }` **Fix:** Add media query to switch to single column at 320px ``` ``` **Finding:** Required fields marked with asterisk only (no `aria-required="true") **WCAG:** 3.3.2 Labels or Instructions **Perspective:** Screen Reader & Semantic **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: Content Author) **Evidence:** `required-asterisk` span with `aria-hidden="true"` **Fix:** Add `aria-required="true"` to checkbox inputs ``` --- ## A11y Evidence Findings ### A11y Evidence Finding finding_id: jargon-missing-explanations fingerprint: 3a7d4e1f8c3b2a9d source: perspective-audit cognitive-neurodivergent checklist wcag_or_apg: 3.2.4 Consistent Navigation section_508_fpc_context: 1194.31(a)(2) severity: MAJOR perspective_alarms: cognitive_neurodivergent=HIGH, magnification_reflow=HIGH, screen_reader_semantic=MEDIUM, environmental_contrast=MEDIUM evidence: SECURITY_TOGGLES[0].label, LOGGING_TOGGLES[3].label reproduction_steps: View component in browser expected_behavior: Technical terms should have plain-language explanations actual_behavior: Terms like "HSTS preloading" appear without context trend: new ### A11y Evidence Finding finding_id: error-message-technical-code fingerprint: 5b8e2c9d7a1f3e6b source: perspective-audit cognitive-neurodivergent checklist wcag_or_apg: 3.3.3 Error Suggestion section_508_fpc_context: 1194.31(a)(5) severity: MAJOR perspective_alarms: cognitive_neurodivergent=HIGH, magnification_reflow=HIGH, screen_reader_semantic=MEDIUM, environmental_contrast=MEDIUM evidence: SECURITY_TOGGLES[1].error reproduction_steps: View component in browser expected_behavior: Error messages should use plain English actual_behavior: "ERR_CSP_001" appears without explanation trend: new --- ## Key Code-Level Issues 1. **Grid Layout Breaks at Small Viewports** ```css .settings-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 24px; } ``` - **Fix:** Add media query: ```css @media (max-width: 320px) { .settings-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } } ``` 2. **Missing `aria-required` on Required Checkboxes** ```jsx handleToggle(group, t.id)} /> ``` - **Fix:** Add `aria-required={t.required}` to input 3. **Error Message Needs Plain English** ```jsx {t.error && ( {t.error} )} ``` - **Fix:** Replace "ERR_CSP_001" with user-friendly message --- ## Summary of Required Changes 1. Add plain-language explanations for technical terms (Content Author) 2. Implement responsive grid layout (Visual Design + Front-End Dev) 3. Add `aria-required` to required checkboxes (Front-End Dev) 4. Replace technical error codes with user-friendly messages (Content Author) 5. Add page title for screen reader users (Front-End Dev) The component requires revisions to address cognitive accessibility, layout reflow, and semantic clarity before it can be considered accessible.
